summary: Iteration 16 - Admin Template Board Editing Testing Complete. All features verified: 1) Backend check_board_access() helper correctly grants admin/creator access to template boards, 2) All CRUD endpoints (lists, cards) work for template boards when accessed by admin, 3) Frontend Admin Panel Templates tab shows 4 action buttons per row (preview, board editor, metadata edit, delete), 4) Board editor button navigates to /board/{template_id} showing full Kanban board, 5) Admin can add lists and cards via UI.

issues: Console warning: HTML hydration error with <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic issue from React dev tools, does not affect functionality
WebSocket connection warning when loading template board - WebSocket closes before connection established, but board still loads correctly

passed_tests: Backend: Admin can GET /api/boards/{template_id} for a template board
Backend: Template board GET returns lists with cards
Backend: Admin can POST /api/boards/{template_id}/lists to create a list in template
Backend: Creating list without auth returns 401
Backend: Admin can POST /api/lists/{list_id}/cards to create a card in template list
Backend: Admin can create card in existing template list
Backend: Admin can PATCH /api/cards/{card_id} to update a card in template
Backend: Admin can update card with labels and priority in template
Backend: Admin can DELETE /api/lists/{list_id} to delete a list from template
Backend: Deleting list without auth returns 401
Backend: Admin can DELETE /api/cards/{card_id} to delete a card from template
Backend: check_board_access() correctly allows admin access to template boards
Backend: Unauthenticated users cannot edit template boards
Frontend: Admin Panel Templates tab loads correctly
Frontend: Templates tab shows table with name, category, creator, stats, actions columns
Frontend: Preview button (Eye icon) is present per template row
Frontend: Board editor button (LayoutTemplate icon) is present per template row
Frontend: Metadata edit button (Pencil icon) is present per template row
Frontend: Delete button (Trash icon) is present per template row
Frontend: Clicking board editor button navigates to /board/{template_id}
Frontend: Template board shows full Kanban view with lists (To Do, In Progress, Done)
Frontend: 'Add another list' button is present and clickable on template board
Frontend: 'Add a card' buttons are present in each list on template board
Frontend: Add list form shows input field and 'Add List' button
Frontend: Add card form shows 'Enter card title...' input and 'Add' button
Frontend: Metadata edit dialog opens with pre-filled name/description/category
Frontend: Delete button triggers confirmation dialog
critical_code_review_comments: check_board_access() helper at line 403 correctly implements: 1) workspace membership check, 2) admin access to templates, 3) creator access to templates
All ~20 CRUD endpoints (lists, cards, attachments, etc.) now use check_board_access() for authorization
Frontend AdminPage.js correctly implements 4 action buttons per template row with proper data-testid attributes
Board editor button uses navigate(`/board/${template.board_id}`) for navigation
Template boards are fully editable via the standard BoardPage.js Kanban interface
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified admin template board editing feature. Key implementation: check_board_access() helper in server.py (line 403) grants access if: 1) user has workspace membership, 2) board is_template AND user is admin, 3) board is_template AND user is creator. This helper is used in ~20 endpoints. Frontend has 4 action buttons per template row: Eye (preview), LayoutTemplate (board editor), Pencil (metadata edit), Trash (delete). Board editor navigates to /board/{template_id} which shows full Kanban editing UI. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_template_board_editing.py

check_board_access_helper.details: Helper at line 403 correctly grants admin/creator access to template boards

admin_get_template_board.details: GET /api/boards/{template_id} returns board with lists and cards for admin

admin_create_card_in_template.details: POST /api/lists/{list_id}/cards creates card in template list

admin_update_card_in_template.details: PATCH /api/cards/{card_id} updates card title, description, labels, priority

template_kanban_view.details: Full Kanban board displayed with lists, cards, add list/card buttons

metadata_edit_dialog.details: Pencil icon opens dialog with pre-filled name/description/category

delete_confirmation.details: Trash icon triggers window.confirm() before deletion
